Malaysian Tennis News

Original write-ups of Malaysian tennis stories — national team, juniors and ITF events. Each article links to the original report at its source.

National Team

Tennis Malaysia targets Davis Cup promotion as hosts of Group III

17 May 2026 · New Straits Times

Tennis Malaysia is targeting promotion when the country hosts the Davis Cup Asia/Oceania Group III competition from 15 to 18 July, with officials backing home advantage to lift the national squad.

Read more →
Racquet Sports

Coach: Malaysian players are well suited to pickleball and padel

May 2026 · New Straits Times

A national coach argues that Malaysia’s racquet-sport pedigree positions its players to compete in fast-growing disciplines such as pickleball and padel alongside tennis, badminton and squash.

Read more →
Juniors / ITF

Kuching stages ITF World Junior Tour J300 Premier Sarawak Cup

8 April 2026 · Borneo Post

The 44th Premier Sarawak Cup, an ITF World Junior Tour J300 event, drew seeded under-18 players from across Asia to the SLTA Centre in Kuching; Malaysia’s lone entrant Daania Daniella Hazli fell in the opening round.

Read more →
Juniors

Daania Hazli sweeps two titles at the 2026 Tennis National Circuit

28 January 2026 · The Star

Junior Daania Daniella Hazli claimed both the women’s Open singles and doubles titles at the opening leg of the 2026 Tennis National Circuit in Kuala Lumpur, edging national No. 1 Elsa Wan in a three-set final.

Read more →
Juniors

Daania Hazli wins three titles at the ITF J30 Phnom Penh

22 November 2025 · Bernama

Malaysian junior Daania Daniella Hazli capped a strong 2025 with a title haul at the Under-18 ITF J30 Phnom Penh, including the girls’ singles and the doubles, ahead of the SEA Games.

Read more →
About this section. Articles are written in-house in our own words from publicly reported facts, and link to the original report; we do not republish outlets' text or photographs. Feature images are on-brand generated graphics — swap for licensed photos if preferred. New stories are added in src/data/news.js.

Last updated: 19 June 2026

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
